title: GGCommons Configuration Schema
description: Canonical cross-language JSON Schema for AWS IoT Greengrass GGCommons library configuration. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all language libraries (java/python/rust/ts). Do not edit the per-library copies directly — edit this file and run schema/sync-schema.(ps1|sh) to propagate it. CI verifies the copies match (sync-schema --check).

format.description: Log pattern format string (interpreted per language: Log4j2 in Java, logging format in Python, etc.)

filePath.description: Path to log file (supports template variables)

maxFileSize.description: Maximum size before the log file is rotated (e.g. 10MB, 512KB, 1GB)

backupCount.description: Number of rotated backup files to keep

globalControl.description: Enable global logging control for entire application

largeFleetWorkaround.description: Enable workaround for large fleet deployments

logFileName.description: Log file path template (for log target)

maxFileSize.description: Maximum log file size (for log target)

destination.description: Messaging destination (for messaging target). 'ipc'/'local' are aliases for the local/IPC transport; 'iotcore'/'iot_core' are aliases for IoT Core.

intervalSecs.description: Emission interval in seconds (for cloudwatch target)

heartbeat.description: Component heartbeat and health monitoring configuration

measures.description: System metrics to include in heartbeat (availability of individual measures varies by language/platform)

disk.description: Include disk usage metrics (not supported on all platforms/languages)

fds.description: Include file descriptor metrics (not supported on all platforms/languages)

destination.description: Messaging destination (for messaging targets). 'ipc'/'local' are aliases for the local/IPC transport; 'iotcore'/'iot_core' are aliases for IoT Core.

tags.description: Component tags for template variable substitution

global.description: Global configuration applied to all instances

messaging.description: Inline messaging configuration (mode + local/IoT Core brokers). The detailed schema is owned and validated by the messaging subsystem; permitted here so it is not rejected as an unknown property. Note: STANDALONE mode is typically configured via a separate messaging-config JSON file passed on the CLI.

streaming.description: Telemetry streaming configuration (durable store-and-forward). The detailed schema (streams, sinks, buffers) is owned and validated by the streaming subsystem (native ggstreamlog core); permitted here so it is not rejected as an unknown property.

credentials.description: Credentials / encrypted local vault configuration (local vault + optional central sync). The detailed schema (vault, keyProvider, central) is owned and validated by the credentials subsystem; permitted here so it is not rejected as an unknown property.

parameters.description: Parameters / externalized configuration (offline-first, pluggable source: awsSsm, mountedDir, env). The detailed schema (source, cache, sync) is owned and validated by the parameters subsystem; permitted here so it is not rejected as an unknown property.
